title: Everbuild 730 Universal Flexible Hygienic Wall and Floor Tile Grout – For Use With Joints Up to 15mm Wide – Grey – 5kg
features: HIGH-STRENGTH – A cementitious grout designed specifically for wall and floor tiles. Suitable for most common tiles including ceramic, natural stone, and porcelain.
WATER RESISTANT – Added powder polymer provides flexibility and water resistance with a durable, water-repellent finish.
EXCELLENT FLEXIBILITY – Excellent crush and flexural strength with added polymer for improved flexibility for use with UFH, perfect for both DIY and professional use.
ANTI-FUNGAL – Contains Mould Shield for long lasting anti-fungal protection against black mould.
VERSATILE – Suitable for both interior and exterior use.
RANGE OF COLOURS AND SIZES – 5kg packs also available in White, Ivory and Anthracite. White also available in 2.5kg pack.
description: From the manufacturer About Everbuild Everbuild – A Sika Company are the UK and Ireland’s largest manufacturer of sealants, adhesives, DIY products, powders and building chemicals. Everbuild are proud to be home to the trade’s most respected products which have been enhanced over the years by class-leading research and facilities. With unique technology including i-Cure and Active Resin Technology, Everbuild’s product development activity is relentlessly setting industry standards at the highest quality and leading the field in solving the problems of the future, today.
